title: Golden Irish Gratin
description: A vegan take on the classic Irish gratin, featuring a rich and creamy golden sauce.
instructions: Peel and slice the golden potatoes into 1/4 inch thick rounds.
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped Irish kale and minced glorious garlic in a little water until tender.
In a separate saucepan, combine the sliced potatoes and a splash of non-dairy milk.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Stir in the shredded vegan cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the potato mixture to a baking dish and top with the sautéed kale and garlic.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is heated through.
